evidence_rows.reading: V1.7 opened lawfully as a bounded promotion-evidence generation phase.
The current review answered what evidence is still missing for each provisional candidate.
The branch remains below promotion threshold, so closure should preserve promotion shortfalls rather than force promotion or new branches.

interpretation: V1.7 has now answered its core question: what new evidence would be required to change retained-feature promotion judgment for current provisional candidates.
That is enough to close the phase successfully without promoting any feature into retained status.
Per the autonomy policy, the correct move is to enter waiting state until a new owner phase switch or trigger appears.
